blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 56°F.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
